name: doc-sync-agent
description: Compare source code against Confluence documentation using GitHub Copilot

chatParticipants.name: doc-sync
chatParticipants.description: Compare workspace code against Confluence documentation and post a sync report

commands.name: check
commands.description: Compare workspace code against a Confluence page and post a sync report

docSync.confluenceEmail.description: Confluence Cloud only: your Atlassian account email. Leave empty when using a Personal Access Token (PAT) for Confluence Data Center / Server.

docSync.confluenceApiToken.description: Confluence Cloud: API token from id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. Confluence Data Center/Server: Personal Access Token (PAT) — used as a Bearer token, no email required.
